note: Editable page copy (slice 02.1). Values are HTML fragments rendered verbatim - inline <strong>/<em>/<a> allowed, structure lives in templates/*.j2. The agent edits items here, never templates.

about.hero.title: Born from the journey we lived
about.hero.lede: Legacy exists to be the support we wish our own family had.

about.story.heading: From one family's journey to a community's sanctuary
paragraphs: Legacy began as a home health agency. When the pandemic made it impossible to keep nurses on staff, we faced a choice — and chose to follow the deeper calling behind the work.

Our founder cared for her mother through younger-onset dementia while still a teenager. She lived the gaps firsthand — the exhaustion, the isolation, the support that never came. After her mother passed, that experience became a mission: be the support we didn't have.
In 2023 we became a nonprofit devoted entirely to the caregivers of loved ones living with dementia — their wellness, their rest, and their community.
about.story.note: Draft copy for Legacy's review — we'll refine this story together in your words.

items.title: Caregivers first
items.when: Your wellness matters — not just your loved one's care

items.title: No judgment, ever
items.when: Every journey is different; every feeling is welcome

items.title: Real rest, not lip service
items.when: Free respite and grants that fund actual self-care

items.title: Community over isolation
items.when: People who truly understand, in the same room

about.join.heading: The Caregiver Sanctuary is free — and it's for you
about.join.body: Support groups, wellness grants, Memory Socials, and events — one free membership connects you to all of it.

programs.hero.title: The Caregiver Sanctuary
programs.hero.lede: A free membership community for caregivers of loved ones living with dementia — support, wellness, and respite, designed by someone who's lived the journey.

programs.membership.heading: One membership, every kind of support
paragraphs: Sanctuary membership is free and connects you to everything Legacy offers: the weekly Virtual Support Group, Wellness Grants, Memory Socials, caregiver events, and the Resource Hub.
One short form, once — after that, everything you do with Legacy builds on the same profile. No repeating your story every time.

programs.support_group.heading: A judgment-free hour that's just for you
paragraphs: Every Wednesday evening, caregivers gather online to talk honestly about the journey — the hard parts, the wins, and everything in between. Certified facilitation, zero judgment, real connection.
Register once and you're on the list — reminders and the meeting link come to you.

programs.grants.heading: A personalized stipend for your well-being
paragraphs: Caregivers spend so much on everyone else. Wellness Grants fund the things that restore you — a massage, counseling, a gym membership — and every award comes with its own care package.
Sanctuary members are eligible. Apply online; our team reviews each application and personalizes the award to your wellness plan.

timeline.title: 4 · Check-in & outcomes
timeline.when: We follow your journey, not just the award

programs.socials.panel_note: When our community center opens, Memory Social registration and check-in will live right here on this site.
programs.socials.heading: A welcoming place for your loved one — a real break for you
paragraphs: Memory Socials are supervised gatherings for people living with dementia: familiar activities, gentle social connection, and no pressure to participate in any certain way. You can step away knowing your loved one is in trained, caring hands.
Memory Social Caregiver Events run alongside — while your loved one is engaged, you join other caregivers for wellness, connection, or education. Together in the same space, each of you cared for.

programs.coaching.heading: 1:1 Wellness Coaching
programs.coaching.body: Private sessions with Shanelle — The Dementia Caregiver Wellness Coach. Personal guidance for your caregiving journey, one conversation at a time.

request_support.hero.title: Request Support
request_support.hero.lede: For yourself, or for a caregiver you know. One short form — we take it from there.

request_support.form.heading: Tell us what you need
request_support.form.sub: Every request goes straight to our team — no phone tag required.

request_support.next.heading: A person, not a process

steps.title: 1 · We read it same-day
steps.when: Requests route straight to the team's work queue

steps.title: 2 · We reach out
steps.when: Within two business days, by your preferred contact

steps.title: 3 · We connect you
steps.when: Membership, respite, grants, groups — whatever fits

request_support.next.crisis_html: In crisis right now? Don't wait on a form — see Crisis Help in the Resource Hub for the caregiver support hotline.
